blog_title: Planning a Trip to North East India? No Time Is Better Than Now!
seo_title: Planning a Trip to North East India? No Time Is Better Than Now!
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Wed Jun 18 2025

Are you planning a romantic getaway for your honeymoon? If you are seeking a unique and enchanting destination, North East India should be at the top of your list. Nestled in the easternmost part of India, this region is known for its breathtaking landscapes, rich cultural diversity, and warm hospitality. Explore the best destinations to consider for your tour packages for North East India, and why the time after the rains is the best to visit these:

Kaziranga National Park, Assam:

Your North East India journey could start with a visit to the famous Kaziranga National Park in Assam. This UNESCO World Heritage Site is renowned for its population of one-horned rhinoceroses, tigers, and various bird species. A jeep safari through the park will allow you to witness these magnificent creatures in their natural habitat. The lush greenery and serene environment make it a perfect place for couples who love wildlife and adventure. Post-rains, the lush greenery and replenished water sources make it the ideal time to spot diverse wildlife in Kaziranga.

Shillong, Meghalaya:

Known as the “Scotland of the East,” Shillong is the capital of Meghalaya and a picturesque destination. The city is surrounded by rolling hills, pristine lakes, and waterfalls. Do not miss a visit to Umiam Lake, where you can enjoy a romantic boat ride. Additionally, the clean and pleasant weather makes Shillong an ideal place to relax. After the rains, Shillong’s landscapes come alive with vibrant flora and cascading waterfalls, creating a romantic ambiance.

Gangtok, Sikkim:

Perched in the Himalayan mountains, Gangtok offers breathtaking views, colorful Buddhist monasteries, and a vibrant local culture. Take a cable car ride to witness the awe-inspiring landscapes from above, visit the Rumtek Monastery for spiritual solace, and explore the charming local markets for souvenirs. The post-monsoon season offers clear skies and breathtaking views of the Himalayas, perfect for couples to explore together.


Tawang, Arunachal Pradesh:

This remote town is known for its stunning monasteries, including the famous Tawang Monastery, which is the largest in India. The journey to Tawang is an adventure in itself, with winding roads that offer mesmerizing views of snow-capped peaks and lush valleys. The period after the rains brings out the region’s pristine beauty, making it an excellent time for a secluded getaway with a North East India package.

Mawlynnong, Meghalaya:

If you are looking for a truly offbeat experience, consider Mawlynnong, often hailed as the “Cleanest Village in Asia.” This charming village is known for its spotlessly clean streets, living root bridges, and the Sky View, a bamboo treehouse offering panoramic views of the surrounding landscapes. The post-rains freshness enhances the charm of Mawlynnong’s clean streets and lush green surroundings.

Majuli Island, Assam:

Majuli Island, located in the Brahmaputra River, is the world’s largest river island and a unique destination for honeymooners. It is renowned for its vibrant culture, traditional dance performances, and the opportunity to witness the making of Assamese masks and pottery. Spend your days exploring the island’s natural beauty, including its wetlands and birdlife. The Brahmaputra River swells with life after the rains, and Majuli Island is at its vibrant best during this time.

Conclusion

You can see these and more by choosing the right North East India tour package from the right agency. Go for an esteemed tour package provider with competitive offerings, and you can be assured of the best travel experience.
